intent_tree: {"验证链接是否正确并找到所需文章": {"快速检查链接有效性": {"使用在线工具验证链接状态": {}, "通过浏览器直接测试链接": {}}, "分析URL的有效性": {}, "检查文章内容与需求的匹配性": {}, "提供备用方案以处理无效链接": {}, "提取文章内容": {"获取文章标题": {}, "获取文章正文": {"标记主标题位置": {}, "确保内容完整性": {}}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "接收用户提供的URL或描述"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "分析URL是否存在可疑特征（如拼写错误或异常域名）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "从URL中提取关键词并与用户描述的文章主题进行匹配"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "建议使用工具（如Wayback Machine）查找归档版本以应对无效链接"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "返回结果给用户，包括URL有效性及匹配性评估"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "引导用户使用DownForEveryoneOrJustMe检查链接状态"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "指导用户在隐私模式下手动测试链接"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "使用Python脚本解析HTML页面"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "提取页面中的<h1>标签作为标题"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "提取页面中的<article>或指定<div>标签作为正文"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "标记标题为主要内容的起始部分"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "验证提取内容的完整性（长度、关键短语、结构）"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "analyzeURL"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "extractKeywords"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "evaluateMatch"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "suggestAlternatives"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "includeSuggestions"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node6", "type": "redirectTool"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "manualTesting"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node5", "type": "reportStatus"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node8", "type": "parseHTML"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "extractTitle"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node10", "type": "extractBody"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node11", "type": "markTitle"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node12", "type": "validateContent"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "ensureCompleteness"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node5", "type": "returnExtractedData"}]}
